protocol: official train/test split; image-level labels; direct visual-label mappings only

mapped_but_not_primary.Edema: The official VinDr-CXR test image-label table has zero positive Edema rows, so test AUC is undefined. Retain it in manifests for transparency but exclude it from the primary macro-AUC denominator.

deliberately_unmapped_examples.Infiltration: Not a clean synonym for CheXpert Lung Opacity.
deliberately_unmapped_examples.Nodule/Mass: Not identical to the broader CheXpert Lung Lesion field.
deliberately_unmapped_examples.Rib fracture / Clavicle fracture: Could be collapsed to Fracture, but this hierarchy changes label semantics and is excluded from the primary protocol.

train_aggregation: majority vote: at least 2 of 3 radiologists
